summary: Iteration 56: Step-wise Document Management - All features verified working. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All 10 features verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified all recently fixed bugs are working correctly: (1) Admin workflow step docs persist - ECA step shows 'ECA Report' and 'Degree Certificate' in Edit Workflow dialog, (2) CM '+Add Doc' inside a step opens dialog titled 'Add Document to Step: [Step Name]' and uses correct API endpoint /api/step-documents/request-step-doc, (3) CM 'Request Additional Document' header button opens separate dialog and uses /api/step-documents/request-additional, (4) Admin default docs sync to case_steps - client sees admin-defined docs in their step view, (5) doc_name vs name field handling works correctly in all views.

admin_workflow_step_docs.details: Products page shows workflow steps with document counts. Edit Workflow dialog for Canada PR shows 3 steps. ECA step displays 'Required Documents: ECA Report *, Degree Certificate *' confirming admin docs persist.

admin_add_doc_to_step.details: Backend test verified: Admin can add document to workflow step via PUT /api/products/{id}/workflow-step/{order} with required_documents array. Document persists after save.

cm_add_doc_inside_step.details: CM case detail shows '+Add Doc' button inside each unlocked step. Clicking opens dialog titled 'Add Document to Step: Integration Test Step'. Uses POST /api/step-documents/request-step-doc endpoint. Document appears IN the step, NOT in Additional Documents.

cm_request_additional_document.details: CM case detail shows 'Request Additional Document' button in header. Clicking opens 'Request Additional Document' dialog. Uses POST /api/step-documents/request-additional endpoint. Document appears in separate Additional section.

cm_customization_enabled.details: Case detail view shows 'Customization Enabled' badge when workflow customization is allowed. +Add Doc buttons visible per step.

client_step_documents_view.details: Client Doc Completion tab shows StepDocuments component with 8 step cards. Progress bar shows 12% (1/8 uploaded). Each step shows document count and status.

client_step_expansion.details: Clicking step card expands to show documents. Step 1 (Profile Creation) shows Passport (mandatory, Upload button) and Photo (mandatory, approved status).

admin_default_docs_sync.details: Backend GET /api/step-documents/case/{id} merges admin default docs from workflow_steps into case_steps. Client sees admin-defined docs with source='admin_default'.

doc_name_field_handling.details: API handles both 'doc_name' and 'name' fields. Response always includes 'doc_name' field. Frontend renders correctly regardless of field name used.

step_documents_api.details: All 4 endpoints working: GET /case/{id} returns steps with documents, POST request-step-doc adds to step, POST request-additional adds to separate section, POST remove-step-doc removes CM-added doc.

admin_products.workflow_steps_visible: 3 steps for Canada PR: Integration Test Step, ECA, IELTS/CELPIP/PTE CORE
admin_products.required_documents_visible: ECA step shows 'ECA Report *' and 'Degree Certificate *'
admin_products.edit_workflow_dialog: Opens correctly with step list and edit buttons

cm_case_detail.add_doc_buttons: 1 +Add Doc button visible in unlocked step
cm_case_detail.add_doc_dialog_title: Add Document to Step: Integration Test Step

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails

bugs_verified_fixed: Admin workflow step docs not persisting - FIXED: Docs now show in Edit Workflow dialog
CM '+Add Doc' inside step going to Additional Documents - FIXED: Now uses correct API endpoint /api/step-documents/request-step-doc
Admin default docs not syncing to existing case_steps - FIXED: Backend merges workflow_steps docs into case_steps on read
doc_name vs name field mismatch - FIXED: API handles both fields, response always includes doc_name
